# NimoteCode Full Context

> NimoteCode is a mobile-first IDE and developer workspace for iPhone, iPad, and Android. It is built for real development work on mobile: SSH access, code editing, terminal sessions, Git review and write workflows, AI assistance, debugging, task execution, timeline diagnostics, and sync/cache movement between environments.

NimoteCode is not a code viewer or note-taking app. It is designed for practical workflows such as remote hotfixes, on-call diagnostics, AI-assisted coding, and mobile-first project inspection and delivery.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://nimotecode.com/): Product overview and demo-led landing page.
- [Features](https://nimotecode.com/features): Core feature summary.
- [Pro](https://nimotecode.com/pro): Free and Pro comparison.
- [Download](https://nimotecode.com/download): Install steps and store links.
- [Use Cases](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/): Scenario hub for mobile development work.

## Documentation
- [Quick Start](https://nimotecode.com/docs/quick-start): First-run setup and workspace basics.
- [SSH Workspace](https://nimotecode.com/docs/ssh): Remote connection setup and workspace behavior.
- [Editor](https://nimotecode.com/docs/editor): Editing gestures, navigation, and workflows.
- [Terminal](https://nimotecode.com/docs/terminal): Terminal sessions and command execution.
- [Search](https://nimotecode.com/docs/search): File and output search guidance.
- [Source Control](https://nimotecode.com/docs/source-control): Git status, diff, staging, commit, push, pull, branches, and stashes.
- [AI Assistant](https://nimotecode.com/docs/ai): AI Chat and AI Agent usage.
- [LSP](https://nimotecode.com/docs/lsp): Language server diagnostics and code actions.
- [Debug](https://nimotecode.com/docs/debug): Breakpoints, stack inspection, variables, and watch views.
- [Tasks](https://nimotecode.com/docs/tasks): Task creation and execution.
- [Timeline](https://nimotecode.com/docs/timeline): Event inspection and causal troubleshooting.
- [Sync / Cache](https://nimotecode.com/docs/sync-cache): Workspace movement and cache flows.
- [Account and Subscription](https://nimotecode.com/docs/account-subscription): Account and premium verification behavior.
- [Security](https://nimotecode.com/docs/security): Safety and review-related settings.
- [Settings](https://nimotecode.com/docs/settings): App configuration and preferences.
- [Configuration](https://nimotecode.com/docs/configuration): Advanced setup and environment configuration.
- [FAQ](https://nimotecode.com/docs/faq): Common questions and answers.

## Use Cases
- [Remote Hotfix](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/remote-hotfix): Patch production from a phone.
- [On-call Diagnostics](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/on-call-diagnostics): Investigate incidents while away from a desk.
- [AI Agent Workflows](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/ai-agent): Use AI inside a real development workflow.

## Support And Policy
- [Support](https://nimotecode.com/support): Help and contact information.
- [Privacy](https://nimotecode.com/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://nimotecode.com/terms): Terms of service.
- [Account Deletion](https://nimotecode.com/account-delete): Account deletion instructions.

## Locales
- [English](https://nimotecode.com/): Default locale.
- [Chinese](https://nimotecode.com/zh/): Simplified Chinese locale.
- [Japanese](https://nimotecode.com/ja/): Japanese locale.
- [Korean](https://nimotecode.com/ko/): Korean locale.
- [Russian](https://nimotecode.com/ru/): Russian locale.
- [Spanish](https://nimotecode.com/es/): Spanish locale.

## Notes
- The site is VitePress-generated and primarily serves markdown documentation, product pages, and policy pages.
- The public documentation is intentionally concise so LLMs can use the linked pages as focused context rather than scraping the entire site.
